    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    interface 
    IAgent
    Represents the base agent that can take an action in Risk.
    Classes in edu.bu.pas.risk.agent that implement RiskListener
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    final record 
    DummyAgent
    When we provide copies of GameView to you, we replace the actual agents with these dummy agents for security reasons.
    class 
    FSMAgent
    Represents a class that moves through a finite state machine when deciding what Actions to make during its turn.
    class 
    HumanAgent
    An agent controlled by a human player via the UI.
    class 
    NeuralQAgent
    Represents a agent containing a neural network acting as a q-function.
    final record 
    RandomAgent
    An agent that makes random decisions.
    final record 
    StaticAgent
    Represents a "neutral territory" agent.
    class 
    TrainerAgent

  • Uses of RiskListener in edu.bu.pas.risk.util

    Classes in edu.bu.pas.risk.util that implement RiskListener
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    final class 
    TrustlessRiskListener
    Wraps a RiskListener and makes it secure via: adding timeouts copying game state catching unhandled exceptions
    Constructors in edu.bu.pas.risk.util with parameters of type RiskListener
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    TrustlessRiskListener(RiskListener wrapped, long timeoutMillis, Consumer<Throwable> punishment)
    Wraps the given listener with timeout and error handling.
